name: Sample Sport Active
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#0f0f0f"/>
  
      <!-- Sport ring -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="210" fill="none" stroke="#00ff88" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.5"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="200" fill="none" stroke="#00ff88" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
      
      <!-- Activity arc (steps progress) -->
      <path d="M 225 50 A 175 175 0 0 1 400 225" fill="none" stroke="#00ff88" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.8"/>
      
      <!-- Heart rate zone indicator -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="140" fill="none" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="10 5" opacity="0.4"/>
      
      <line x1="225" y1="55" x2="225" y2="70" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="225" y="30" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">12</text>
  <line x1="310" y1="77.77568135664544" x2="302.5" y2="90.76606241341202" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="322.5" y="56.12504626203449" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">1</text>
  <line x1="372.2243186433546" y1="140" x2="359.233937586588" y2="147.5" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="393.87495373796554" y="127.50000000000001" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">2</text>
  <line x1="395" y1="225" x2="380" y2="225" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="420" y="225" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">3</text>
  <line x1="372.2243186433546" y1="310" x2="359.233937586588" y2="302.5" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="393.87495373796554" y="322.5" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">4</text>
  <line x1="310" y1="372.22431864335454" x2="302.5" y2="359.233937586588" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="322.5" y="393.8749537379655" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">5</text>
  <line x1="225" y1="395" x2="225" y2="380" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="225" y="420" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">6</text>
  <line x1="140.00000000000006" y1="372.2243186433546" x2="147.50000000000003" y2="359.233937586588" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="127.50000000000004" y="393.87495373796554" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">7</text>
  <line x1="77.7756813566454" y1="310" x2="90.76606241341199" y2="302.5" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="56.12504626203446" y="322.5" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">8</text>
  <line x1="55" y1="225.00000000000003" x2="70" y2="225.00000000000003" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="30" y="225.00000000000003" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">9</text>
  <line x1="77.77568135664544" y1="140" x2="90.76606241341202" y2="147.5" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="56.12504626203449" y="127.49999999999997" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">10</text>
  <line x1="139.99999999999994" y1="77.77568135664546" x2="147.49999999999994" y2="90.76606241341204" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="127.49999999999991" y="56.12504626203449" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">11</text>
      
      
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="145.3683041306257" y2="232.6676602016179" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="126.98928233927951" y2="175.06104502864991" stroke="#00ff88" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="225" y2="355" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="10" fill="#ff6b35" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="1"/>
  
      
      
      
    <g class="complication-heartrate">
      <text x="225" y="70" fill="#ffffff" font-size="16" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">❤️</text>
      <text x="225" y="92" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">72 BPM</text>
    </g>

    <g class="complication-steps">
      <text x="225" y="360" fill="#ffffff" font-size="16" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">👟</text>
      <text x="225" y="382" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">8,542</text>
    </g>

    <g class="complication-battery">
      <text x="80" y="215" fill="#ffffff" font-size="16" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">🔋</text>
      <text x="80" y="237" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">85%</text>
    </g>

    <g class="complication-weather">
      <text x="370" y="215" fill="#ffffff" font-size="16" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">☀️</text>
      <text x="370" y="237" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">18°C</text>
    </g>
    
</svg>
